pr.title: Add scheduled triggers to P2; remove out-of-scope gap items
pr.body:
## Summary
- Keeps scheduled activation + parallel triggers + >3 trigger cap (2.1.6, $2,900/mo) in Pillar 2
- Removes items deemed out of scope for this strategy:
  - P1: contact tax billing (1.4.2)
  - P2: activation funnel (3.2.1–3.2.3), win-back (3.5.1), discovery/tags/benchmarking (3.7.1–3.7.3)
  - P3: Segments AI (4.1.4), RCS (5.1.2), AMP interactive (5.3.1)

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify all three pillar tables render cleanly
- [ ] Confirm removed rows are gone
- [ ] Confirm 2.1.6 (scheduled activation) remains in P2


Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
pr.author: deepakp1308
